finding.title: Running as root
finding.detail: Mantou is being run as uid 0 (root). OpenClaw itself should not run as root — any agent mistake becomes a root-level action.
finding.remediation: Create a dedicated non-root service account for OpenClaw. Run: sudo useradd -r -s /bin/false openclaw

finding.title: Running inside Docker container
finding.detail: /.dockerenv detected — OpenClaw is running inside a container. Verify container hardening (see OS-003 / OS-004).
finding.remediation: Ensure container runs with --read-only, --no-new-privileges, and no Docker socket mount.

finding.title: OpenClaw version detected
finding.detail: OpenClaw version captured for audit trail. Ensure automatic updates are enabled or a review schedule is in place.
finding.remediation: No action required unless the version is significantly outdated.
